mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_model t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.name},'%')
AND t.code like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.code},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM kb_model t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.name},'%')
AND t.code like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.code},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbModelEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_model t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
select t.* from kb_model t join kb_channel t1 on t.id =t1.model join cms_article t2 on t1.id = t2.channel_id where t2.id = #{id}
